rulings.Case Title: KATHRYN SCHULTZ et al VS. ASTRAZENECA PHARMACEUTICALS, L.P. et al*****CASE TRANSFERRED TO SUTTER COUNTY*****
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Transfer Venue
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, October 28, 2009, line 5, DEFENDANTS ASTRAZENECA PHARMACEUTICALS, L.P., ASTRAZENECA, L.P., JANSSEN PHARMACEUTICA INC., AND JOHNSON & JOHNSON'S Motion To Transfer Venue. MOTION TO TRANSFER VENUE TO SUTTER COUNTY GRANTED. NO TRIAL DATE IS SET AND DISCOVERY IS ONGOING. THE MOTION IS TIMELY AND TRANSFER WOULD NOT PREJUDICE PLAINTIFFS. DEFENDANTS' DECLARATIONS SUFFICIENT TO DEMONSTRATE THE CONVENIENCE OF WITNESSES AND THE ENDS OF JUSTICE WOULD BE PROMOTED BY THE CHANGE. SUTTER COUNTY PHYSICIANS WILL SAVE TIME AND EXPENSE WITH LESS ADVERSE IMPACT ON THEIR PRACTICES BY GRANTING THIS MOTION. PERCIPIENT WITNESSES ARE LOCATED IN SUTTER COUNTY. NO COUNTER - DECLARATIONS SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFFS. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN LIU et al VS. EDWARD NOVAK et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Strike Cross-Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, October 28, 2009, line 11, CROSS-DEFENDANT STANFORD ASSET GROUP, INC., A NEVADA CORPORATION'S Motion To Strike Cross-Complaint. MOTION TO STRIKE GRANTED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. NOVAK, THE TRUSTEE OF THE BALBOA STREET TRUST, MAY NOT REPRESENT THE TRUST IN THE CROSS-COMPLAINT. ZIEGLER V. NICKEL (1998) 64 CAL.APP.4TH 545. IF THE TRUST IS TO REMAIN A CROSS-COMPLAINANT, AN ATTORNEY MUST REPRESENT IT. CROSS-COMPLAINANTS MUST ALSO COMPLY WITH CALIFORNIA RULE OF COURT 2.112 WHICH REQUIRES SPECIFYING THE PARTY OR PARTIES ASSERTING A CAUSE OF ACTION AND THE PARTY OR PARTIES AGAINST WHOM A CAUSE OF ACTION IS DIRECTED. =(302/CWW)
